title: Drovian zwil
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Drovian zwil''' was a potent variation of the drug [[zwil]], produced on [[Algara II]]. The [[Drovian]]s were one of only a few species to find the original form addictive, and produced this stronger version to suit their needs.<ref name="CCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref>

The [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]] spicelord [[Volven Roxe]], in charge of the [[Outlander Club/Legends|Outlander Club]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], was addicted to this drug, although he never traded it himself.<ref name="CCW" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''
